name: Customer Support Ticket Handler
description: Process support tickets: categorize, analyze, draft response, review, and send

steps.name: ticket-classification
steps.prompt_template:
Classify this support ticket. Determine category, priority, urgency, and sentiment:

{{input}}

steps.name: issue-analysis
check-for-urgency
steps.prompt_template:
Based on the classification, respond with 'URGENT' if this needs immediate attention, otherwise 'NORMAL':

{{classification}}

steps.name: draft-escalation
draft-response
response-review
steps.prompt_template:
Review this response for accuracy, tone, completeness, and compliance. Identify any issues:

Response: {{draft_response}}

steps.name: needs-revision
steps.prompt_template:
Based on the review, respond with 'REVISION_NEEDED' if the response needs changes, otherwise 'OK':

{{review}}

steps.name: revise-response
finalize
